body: Found two ceiling tiles in the Fellowship Hall with a water stain this morning. Same corner as last spring. Called Hank at Rondorf's, he can come look Thursday.
Ugh, not that corner again. You need Roger to come help move anything before Hank gets there?
Nah, Dale's swinging by after Koffee Kup tomorrow. Between us we'll get the tiles down and see what we're dealing with. He's taller anyway.
Ok good. Tell Dale hi. And please don't let him talk you into getting on that roof yourselves 😄
Dale says the Koffee Kup's got a new girl working Tuesdays. Spells Roger with a D. Asked me if I was a regular. Twenty years and she still writes Gerry on the cup.
Ha. You finally got a nickname. How's the church holding up after that wind last week?
Lost a piece of flashing off the east roof. Got it patched before Wednesday service. Nate still coming Saturday to help me fix that downspout on the fellowship hall?
Yeah he'll be there. Told him you'd probably put him to work. He seemed fine with it.
Coat rack in the narthex pulled clean out of the wall this morning. Got it fixed before the Bible study ladies showed up. Two toggle bolts. Holds better now than it ever did.
Anchors or studs before?
Just anchors. Dale spotted me a coffee after at Koffee Kup. Said I earned it. High praise from Dale.
Ha. Fair enough. You around Saturday? Tyler's been talking about driving up to Aberdeen.
Dale says hi. Told him you got that Eagle Scout award and he about fell off his stool at the Koffee Kup.
Haha tell Dale I said thanks. Did you actually talk about me or are you making that up
Maybe a little of both. Anyway you coming to the church Christmas concert? I can leave you a bulletin so you know where to sit.
Yeah I'll be there. Save me a spot by you Grandpa
Grandpa!! Nate told me you fixed the broken pew at church again lol are you literally the only one who does anything over there 😂
Pretty much. Pastor Dave keeps saying he'll call somebody but I'm already there so. Saves the church some money.
Ok but you need to actually let people help you sometimes!! How's Dale doing btw
Dale's fine. Complained about his knee the whole time at Koffee Kup this morning. I told him at least the coffee's hot. He laughed.
Dale says you used to like coming to the Koffee Kup back in the day. You still drink coffee or are you all energy drinks now?
I still drink coffee Grandpa 😄 haven't been to Koffee Kup in forever though
Well come find me some Monday morning. I'm there with Dale around 7. Not hard to find two old guys in the corner.
Deal. Maybe this summer when I'm back. You still doing stuff at the church too?
Saw Nate riding his bike past the church this morning. He's getting big. Roger teach him that or did he just figure it out?
Figured it out mostly. Fell a few times first. Karen said he's already trying to go no hands.
That tracks. Church calendar's got the fall potluck on the 12th. You bringing that hot dish again or is Donna handling it this year?
Donna's got it. I'm just showing up and eating. Figured I earned that much after fixing the fellowship hall sink twice this month.
Dale was in rare form at Koffee Kup this morning. Forty-five minutes on whether the Lutherans or the Catholics got better parking downtown. I had to get to the church eventually.
Ha! Who won?
Nobody. That's kind of the point with Dale.
Fair enough. You working over at Bethlehem today?
Linda, wondering if I could swap to Tuesday instead of Wednesday this week. Tyler's got a ball game Wednesday afternoon over in Watertown and I'd like to make it.
Of course, Gary. Tuesday works fine. Fellowship hall floors could use a buff before Sunday anyway if you have time 🙂
I'll get the floors. Gonna take a look at that back entry door too while I'm at it — draft comin' under it something awful.
That door's been a problem all winter, yes. Thank you Gary. Tell Tyler we're rooting for him!
Barb, that long folding table on the east wall in the fellowship hall — hinge on the left leg is bent bad, won't lock. I'd pull it before Wednesday. Don't want someone's hot dish on the floor.
Oh goodness yes, please pull it. WELCA's got 14 ladies coming Wednesday evening. Is there another one you can swap in from storage?
Already done. Put a piece of tape on the bad one that says 'broken leg' so nobody grabs it by mistake. Other one's set and level.
Gary Pittman you are worth your weight in gold 😄 I don't know what we'd do without you over there.
Gary, got your bloodwork back from last week. Vitamin D is still running low — you remembering to take it in the mornings? Want to make sure you're keeping up with it.
Most days. Sometimes Dale's already out front before I get to it. Koffee Kup waits for nobody, I guess. I'll move the bottle next to the coffeepot.
That'll do it. Everything else looked fine — no concerns. Just keep that one going consistently. Good for the bones especially heading into winter.
Appreciate you checking. Nate's driving up from Sioux Falls this weekend so I wanted to make sure nothing was hanging. Good news to have before he gets here.
Gary — following up from Tuesday's appointment. How'd the rest of the week go at the church? You mentioned a big cleanup on the calendar.
Not bad. Nate drove up from Sioux Falls to help me move the folding tables out of the basement. Made it a lot easier.
That's good thinking — glad you had backup. Are you staying ahead of the heat? Aberdeen's been warmer than usual this week.
Koffee Kup has AC. Dale and I handled that part just fine.
Keith, it's Gary Pittman. Cracked something on a jawbreaker Nate left in my truck. Doesn't hurt much but it's sharp. You got anything open this week that isn't Tuesday? That's my day at Bethlehem.
Hey Gary! Ouch. I've got Wednesday at 2pm or Thursday morning at 9. Either one work for you?
Thursday at 9 is good. Dale and I do Koffee Kup on Mondays so I'd need to be back in Aberdeen by noon anyway. Thursday's fine.
Perfect, you're on the books. We'll smooth it down, probably a ten-minute job. See you Thursday! 👍
Gary, just checking — did those new bifocals end up working out okay? You mentioned the church bulletin print was giving you trouble.
Better. Still squinting at the Monday calendar this morning but Dale says I just need to quit holding it at arm's length. He's probably right.
Ha! If arm's length isn't cutting it, swing by the office. Might need to bump up the add strength a little.
Might do that. Jeff's been after me about it too. I'll call next week after my shift at Bethlehem.
AC unit at Bethlehem Lutheran went out sometime overnight. Fellowship hall's already 80 degrees and it's barely 9am. Can you get someone over here today or tomorrow?
Hi Gary — we can get a tech out Wednesday morning, say 9–11. Does that work for the church?
Wednesday's fine. I'll be here. Just don't want it going into Sunday with 90-degree weather and a full sanctuary. Pastor Strand'll hear about it either way.
Understood, we'll make it a priority. Tech will call you when he's 30 min out. See you Wednesday, Gary.
Somebody left the back fellowship hall faucet dripping again. Gonna fix it before Sunday. Probably just the washer but I'm grabbing the big wrench from the shed first.
Gary don't go messing with plumbing on your own. Is Pastor Mike even around today?
He stopped in around 9. Said thanks and went back to his office. Dale's meeting me here at noon so I got company don't worry.
Ok good. There's chili on the stove when you're done. Tell Dale he can eat too if he wants.
Fixed that bathroom door at Bethlehem finally. Been dragging on the linoleum since Easter. Dale says I should've charged extra.
Ha. They at least feed you over there?
Nah. Karen dropped Nate off after school though so that was good. Kid's getting tall on me.
Growing fast. Tell Karen I said hi next time.
Gary, did Nate end up coming with you to Bethlehem this week? Karen said he might tag along.
Showed up Tuesday. Helped me haul the folding tables back to the storage room. Didn't complain once.
Takes after his grandpa. You having coffee with Dale tomorrow?
Same as every morning. Koffee Kup at 7.
Gary, heard the side door by the coatroom's been sticking again. Did you get to that yet?
Got it Monday. Planed the bottom edge, shuts clean now. Told Dale about it at Koffee Kup and he said I should've done it two years ago. He's not wrong.
Ha! That sounds like Dale. I'll sleep better knowing it closes right. Any word on whether they're doing something special for the 4th of July service?
Nothing on the calendar yet. I'll be in Thursday, I'll take a look then and let you know.

Harold, stopped by after my shift and left a bulletin on your door. Emma drew the fish on the front — she was helping Nate color bulletins in the fellowship hall Tuesday. Thought you'd get a kick out of it.
Well I'll be. That girl's got more artistic talent than the whole consistory combined haha. How'd the boiler inspection go?
Passed. Which is a miracle considering how it sounds on cold mornings. Dale says it purrs like a cat. I say Dale's never owned a cat.
Ha! You're probably right. Tell Dale I said hello next time you're at the Koffee Kup. And thank Emma for me — fish is going on the fridge.
